description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display with a small teardrop notch at the top for the front-facing camera. The back panel is a smooth, matte turquoise color and houses a vertical array of four camera lenses and a flash in the upper left corner, as well as a circular fingerprint sensor in the upper center. The sides are slim and appear to be made of black or dark metallic material, with visible buttons likely for power and volume control. The device is thin and lightweight, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and is designed for handheld use. The screen displays a stylized wallpaper of a woman with white hair, along with app icons and status information.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a turquoise back, quad rear cameras, and a large edge-to-edge display showing a stylized wallpaper and app icons.
description_view_0: Front and back of the phone are visible; the front shows the display with wallpaper and app icons, while the back reveals the turquoise color, quad camera array, and fingerprint sensor.
description_view_1: Side profile of the phone, highlighting its thinness and showing the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing both the front display and the turquoise back with camera and fingerprint sensor.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the slimness and button placement.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital wallpaper featuring a stylized woman with white hair, along with app icons, a clock showing 23:25, date, weather widget (23°C), and navigation bar icons at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: Four rear camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the upper left corner of the back panel; a small front-facing camera is centered in a teardrop notch at the top of the display.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker; no buttons are present on the front or back.
